name: lot of trouble
description: I'm in a lot of trouble
hints: You're in a lot of trouble! This is a death/game-over state.
Something went very wrong. You likely triggered a fatal trap or ran out of resources.
Restore a saved game or restart. Avoid the action that brought you here.
Death room. No exits. Reached by fatal actions (drowning, button traps, sleeping on ledge, etc.).
notes: Death/game-over room. No exits. Reached by fatal actions throughout the game. Must restore or restart.
